texto: If only you knew who you really were you would be fearless and love yourself with a grand passion! You are a unique shard of God, the Universe, the whole or whatever label you would like to call it. No one can take your place and without you endless synchronicity and evolution would not happen. You are so powerful that just by walking down the street you can change someone's life forever.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Michele Knight: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “If only you knew who you really were you would be fearless and love yourself with a grand passion…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, empowerment, spirituality pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e termino.
